title: how much time have you spent in hours thinking about the neighborhood of these three questions about the Bible?
author: joshualinog
excerpt: 1. what is the Bible 2. from my perspective what should my relationship to the Bible be? 3. from God's perspective what should my relationship to the Bible be?
body:
1. what is the Bible
2. from my perspective what should my relationship to the Bible be?
3. from God's perspective what should my relationship to the Bible be?
content:
1. what is the Bible
2. from my perspective what should my relationship to the Bible be?
3. from God's perspective what should my relationship to the Bible be?
